TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bugan 1. mkmugah-mkmugah saku ga mngungu saku kks'ang ay ni yaba mu. 2. pbugah-maha maki saku kya ga,pbugah saku ay. 3. ppbugah-yasa ppbugah saku lga,mhtuw yaba mu la. 4. mugah-nyux saku mugah na huzil qani gauw. 5. mnugah-mnugah saku mrusa maku//mnaki su inu,swa musu in ktay? 6. bnugah-bnugah maku gaw....
S.PHON: ő≤u…£an *. mkmu…£ańß-mkmu…£ańß s~…ēaku …£a mŇčuŇču s~…ēaku kks~…ē ĒaŇč aj ni jaő≤a mu. *. pő≤u…£ańß-mańßa maki s~…ēaku kja …£a,pő≤u…£ańß s~…ēaku aj. *. ppő≤u…£ańß-jas~…ēa ppő≤u…£ańß s~…ēaku l…£a,mńßtuw jaő≤a mu la. *. mu…£ańß-njux s~…ēaku mu…£ańß na ńßuzil qani …£auw. *. mnu…£ańß-mnu…£ańß s~…ēaku mrus~…ēa maku//mnaki s~…ēu inu,s~…ēwa mus~…ēu in ktaj? *. ő≤nu…£ańß-ő≤nu…£ańß maku …£aw....
S.FORM: bugan 1. mkmugah-mkmugah saku ga mngungu saku kks'ang ay ni yaba mu. 2. pbugah-maha maki saku kya ga,pbugah saku ay. 3. ppbugah-yasa ppbugah saku lga,mhtuw yaba mu la. 4. mugah-nyux saku mugah na huzil qani gauw. 5. mnugah-mnugah saku mrusa maku//mnaki su inu,swa musu in ktay? 6. bnugah-bnugah maku gaw....
